BSTD
A lightweight C library providing common data structures and utilities for systems programming.

12#ifndef BSTD_STRVIEW_H
13#define BSTD_STRVIEW_H
14
15#include <bstd/error.h>
16#include <stdbool.h>
17#include <stddef.h>
18
19typedef struct
20{
21 const char *data;
22 size_t length;
23} bstd_strview;
24
25typedef struct
26{
27 bool ok;
28 union
29 {
30 bstd_strview value;
31 bstd_error error;
32 };
33} bstd_strview_result;
34
35typedef struct
36{
37 bstd_strview source;
38 size_t current_index;
39 bstd_strview qry;
40} bstd_strview_split_iter;
41
42typedef struct
43{
44 bstd_strview left;
45 bstd_strview right;
46} bstd_strview_split_once_result;
47
48#define BSTD_STRVIEW_EMPTY \
49 (bstd_strview) \
50 { \
51 .data = NULL, .length = 0 \
52 }
66bstd_strview bstd_strview_new(const char *cstr);
67
75void bstd_strview_print(bstd_strview s);
76
84void bstd_strview_print_raw(bstd_strview s);
85

116

140

169

233
